title: Italian-Style Paella Potatoes
description: A tasty Italian-inspired dish that combines the flavors of paella with the comfort of roasted potatoes.

ingredients.name: Paella rice
ingredients.notes: optional, traditional paella is made with rice

instructions: Peel and chop the robust potatoes into 1-inch pieces.
Place the chopped potatoes in a bowl and drizzle with olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Toss the potatoes to coat evenly and spread them out in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast the potatoes in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
While the potatoes are roasting, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and chopped onion to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the chopped Spanish and Russet potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they are tender.
Season the potatoes with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the roasted potatoes hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
If using paella rice, cook it according to package instructions and serve alongside the potatoes.
